title: Patient met à jour ses constantes médicales et reçoit Zora

checks.query: SELECT constantes_remplies_par, constantes_updated_at FROM users WHERE phone = '+242069735418' AND constantes_updated_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' ORDER BY constantes_updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT action_type FROM wellness_actions WHERE patient_phone = '+242069735418' AND action_type = 'dossier_update' AND created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT points, action_type, proof_class, proof_source, recording_method FROM zora_ledger WHERE phone = '+242069735418' AND action_type = 'dossier_update' AND earned_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
checks.note: montant de points (attendu +30 selon le spec) depend du bareme zora_earn_rules, non verrouille en dur ici
